issues.sample: MOTORCYCLE PARKED IN NOONDAY SUN ON CLEAR 60-DEGREE WINTER DAY. CAME BACK AFTER 2 HOURS TO FIND ELECTRONIC INSTRUMENT PANEL MELTING AND HOT TO THE TOUCH. PANEL ALSO TURNED BLACK SO NO SPEED, FUEL LEVEL, TACHOMETER, AND ENGINE WARNING LIGHTS. IDENTICAL SITUATION OCCURRED DECEMBER

narrative.headline: What 2014 Honda Cb500f owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).

issues.title: Electrical System
